svg.metadata: {"schema_version":1,"id":"17_diamond_rejoin","label":"Diamond split and rejoin","topology":"Split the main road into equally readable left and right alternatives around a central rocky grove, then merge both routes back into one road to T0.","sockets":["B0","T0"],"socket_contract":{"B0":{"edge":"bottom","center":0.5,"direction":"vertical","road_width":0.16},"T0":{"edge":"top","center":0.5,"direction":"vertical","road_width":0.035}}}
